choices.title: The wand appears to be talking to you.

choice.title: Uhh what?
choice.response: Why hello there.

choice.title: What is this?
choice.response: This is magic.

choice.title: A talking wand, great.
choice.response: Indeed it is.

choices.title: The wand appears to be talking to you.

choice.title: So, umm, what are you?
choice.response: I'm a genie trapped in this wand.

choices.title: The genie appears to be trapped.

choice.title: Trapped you say?
choice.response: Yes. For centuries now.

choices.title: The genie appears to be trapped.

choice.title: Why were you trapped?
choice.response: For carrying out wishes of others.

choices.title: The genie appears to be trapped.

choice.title: You can make wishes come true?
choice.response: Yes. Anything you wish is yours.

choices.title: The genie waits for your wish.

choice.title: I wish to be filthy rich!
choice.response: Don't spend it all at once.

choice.title: I wish for a love of my life.
choice.response: One soul mate coming right up.

choice.title: I wish for more wishes.
choice.response: Done. See you when you find another wand.

choices.title: You have made your three wishes already.

choice.title: What is this?!? Only three wishes?
choice.response: There's one more but you don't want to wish that.

choice.title: I wish you would show your face!
choice.response: If you really insist.

choices.title: The genie waits for your wish.

choice.title: Why is that?
choice.response: The wish for power comes with a cost.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Cost? Like what, gold?
choice.response: Oh no, nothing like that.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: What then, my soul?
choice.response: No no no no, nothing from you.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Well, what's the problem then?
choice.response: There is no problem.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Then get on with the wish.
choice.response: You need to be specific.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Alright. I wish for more power.
choice.response: Very well then.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: That's it? I don't feel anything.
choice.response: Why would you, you are not a dwarf.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: What do you mean with that?
choice.response: Well, in order to give you more power...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Yes?
choice.response: I had to take it from someone who has it...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And in this case it came from dwarves.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Dwarves, who or what are they?
choice.response: Well, nobody anymore.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: What?
choice.response: There were 287684 dwarves alive just seconds ago...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: What?!?
choice.response: But now they exist only in rune form.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: You must be kidding?
choice.response: You got me.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Ha ha, you're funny.
choice.response: Yes I am, I left one dwarf alive...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Stop joking.
choice.response: Because he looked like a tripod.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: What?
choice.response: Lyrion Bannister is his name.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Seriously?
choice.response: Yes, I'm totally serious.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: You are mad!
choice.response: Maybe a little but that doesn't change...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: Change what?
choice.response: The fact that you are responsible for...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: For what?
choice.response: The fate of an entire race.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: You're not kidding, are you?
choice.response: No I'm not.

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: So, what now?
choice.response: Well, now I'm going to complete your wish...

choices.title: The genie waits for your response.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: Grant you the power you seek.
